Explanation: I agree with the other agents. The O.J. Simpson trial fits all the criteria: it involved the homicide of Nicole Brown Simpson (a parent) between 1990 and 2002, had a young witness (Simpson's daughter was 8), and featured attorneys who had represented clients in other major cases from the same era. Multiple sources confirm the trial began in January 1995 [22547]. No other case in the search results matches all the specifics.
Exact Answer: January
Confidence: 95%
